payload.answer: The article content could not be extracted because the mock fetch returned a 404 network error.
citations: input: "Remember this article: https://example.com/missing why: useful for memory architecture. Mock fetch result: 404 network error."

entity_resolution.reason: The input does not provide enough information to resolve the article beyond its URL.

memory_cards.statement: A request to remember the article at https://example.com/missing resulted in a mock fetch failure: 404 network error.

details: No article content was available to extract.
Only the fetch failure and the requested URL were supported by the input.

repair_options: Retry fetching the URL if the resource becomes available.
Provide the article text or a working source URL for extraction.
